items.headline: How the Schaeffers turned MLB life into a family adventure

news_items.headline: Pirates' Skenes loses no-hit bid in 7th but gets w...
news_items.summary: Pirates ace Paul Skenes had his no-hit bid vs. the Rockies end in the seventh inning Tuesday night by Mickey Moniak's clean single.

news_items.headline: Alvarez's knee injury dampens Mets' blowout win
news_items.summary: Mets catcher Francisco Alvarez is scheduled to undergo an MRI after leaving Tuesday's 10-2 win with a right knee injury.

news_items.headline: Sources: MLB, players' union hold first CBA talks
news_items.summary: Top officials from Major League Baseball and the MLB Players Association met Tuesday to officially open up collective bargaining talks a little more than six months before the expiration of the game's labor deal, sources told ESPN.

news_items.headline: Dodgers hope days off help slumping Ohtani 'reset'...
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani is in the midst of one of his worst hitting slumps, and the Dodgers are hoping some extra time off shakes him out of it.

news_items.headline: Raleigh ends drought with first hit since April 27...
news_items.summary: Cal Raleigh's hitless streak was the longest in the majors this season and his knock in the seventh inning was his first since April 27.

news_items.headline: Rangers' Nimmo day-to-day with sprained ankle
news_items.summary: Rangers outfielder Brandon Nimmo left Tuesday night's game in the sixth inning with a sprained left ankle and is considered day-to-day.

news_items.headline: Sources: Volpe returns to Yanks; Caballero to IL
news_items.summary: Anthony Volpe is returning to the Yankees, who recalled the former top shortstop prospect from the minor leagues Tuesday.

news_items.headline: Braves put Murphy on IL, could miss 8 weeks
news_items.summary: The Braves placed catcher Sean Murphy on the injured list with a fractured left middle finger, and manager Walt Weiss said he could be out up to eight weeks.

news_items.headline: The A’s drop series opener to the Cards 6-4
news_items.summary: Springs hit hard in the first

news_items.headline: JJ Wetherholt’s Ball Launch Leads St. Louis Cardinals Over Athletics 6-4
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals offense was great out of the starting gate early grabbing a quick 4-0 lead and Andre Pallante’s start was just good enough Tuesday night in Sacramento as the Cardinals offense gave them a 6-4 victory. The Athletics starter Jeffrey Springs threw 26 pitches before recording an out in the first inning […]

news_items.headline: Astros' Tatsuya Imai returns from IL with disaster start vs. Mariners, ERA now at 9.24
news_items.summary: Here's how Imai opened the fourth inning: HBP, HBP, walk, grand slam.

news_items.headline: Cubs Minor League Wrap: South Bend cruises to a 10-1 win
news_items.summary: Wins tonight for Knoxville, South Bend and Mesa.

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani busts out of HR drought with Ice Cube in broadcast booth
news_items.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers TV commentary team of Joe Davis and Orel Hershiser gave Ice Cube the opportunity to analyze Shohei Ohtani's home run.

news_items.headline: Padres offense continues to struggle; first in NL West
Mets' A.J. Ewing showcases 'identity as a hitter' in MLB debut: 'He was pretty much perfect at the plate today'
news_items.summary: it was quite the MLB debut for Mets top prospect A.J. Ewing, helping ignite the team to a 10-2 win over the Detroit Tigers on Tuesday night.

news_items.headline: Braves News: Sean Murphy to miss significant time, Mike Yastrzemski delivers, and more
news_items.summary: ﻿Atlanta Braves news and notes from Tuesday.
